---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
![](images/profile.svg){.profile-photo}

# Jackson Pond

Hi, I'm Jackson — [one or two sentences about who you are and what you
do]. I write about [topics] and build [kind of projects].

## What I'm working on now

- [Current project or focus #1]
- [Current project or focus #2]
- [Current project or focus #3]

[Read my writing →](writing.qmd) &nbsp; | &nbsp; [See my projects →](projects.qmd)
:::
